extDescription.message: A browser extension for easy access to E3, the NYCU learning platform.

labelShowPassword.description: Accessible label for password visibility toggle

labelHidePassword.description: Accessible label for password visibility toggle

btnSave2FAInPage.description: Button to save 2FA secret from QR

msg2FASaveFailed.description: Failed to parse or save 2FA QR

guide2FATitle.description: Title of the 2FA setup guide block

guide2FASubtitle.message: Complete both EZE3 setup and official Google Authenticator setup for backup.
guide2FASubtitle.description: Subtitle of the 2FA setup guide block

guide2FAStep1.message: If your 2FA is already configured, cancel it first.

guide2FAStep2.message: Click "Save 2FA for EZE3" below to save the QR code into EZE3 for auto-fill.

guide2FAStep3.message: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator on your phone and finish the portal setup.
